renewalOption: Automatically renews each month. No separate renewal action is required.

property.description: One-bedroom, one-bathroom upper-floor unit in a well-maintained residential duplex. Hardwood floors throughout. Includes private covered porch, one off-street parking space, and shared backyard. Gas range, refrigerator, and dishwasher included. No in-unit washer/dryer (coin-operated laundromat on premises).

utilities: Included in rent: Water, sewer, garbage collection, landscaping of shared areas. Tenant's responsibility: Gas (PGE account), electricity (Pacific Power), renter's insurance, internet.
petsAllowed: Yes — Up to two (2) small pets (under 25 lbs each) permitted with a refundable pet deposit of $300.00 per animal.
